name: Achiote Marinated Shrimp Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound (21 to 25 pieces) shrimp, deveined and shells reserved for stock
1 bunch scallions, sliced on a diagonal, some reserved for garnish
recipeInstructions:
For the paste: In a blender or food processor, puree first 9 ingredients. Slowly add the lime juice and 4 tablespoons olive oil.
For stock: Heat a heavy bottomed pot over medium heat. Add shrimp shells when smoking starts and cook, stirring occasionally for 6 to 8 minutes or until shells are toasted. Reduce heat to low. Add white wine and reduce by half. Add onion, tomato, and water. Bring to a boil, then reduce to a simmer. Simmer slowly for 45 minutes. Strain the stock.
Cooking shrimp: Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a skillet over medium heat. Mix 2 tablespoons of achiote paste into hot oil. Add 1/2 of the shrimp to the hot pan and stir to coat evenly with the paste. Add 1/2 cup of stock and cook for 5 minutes or until the shrimp are no longer translucent. Set aside in a bowl. Repeat process for the other half.
Assembly: Divide mache and frisee among 6 plates. In a medium size bowl, toss the shrimp with orange sections and scallions. Divide shrimp among plates. Top with scallions and toasted almonds. Serve hot or cold.
Yield: 6 servings
